videos.title: Sharing your truth may just help others find theirs. #TEDTalks
videos.author: TED
videos.description: When fashion model Geena Rocero first saw a photo of herself in a bikini, "I thought ... you have arrived!" As she reveals, that's because she was born with the gender assignment "boy." In this moving talk, Rocero tells the story of becoming who she always knew she was.

videos.title: The Missing Ingredient in Every Peace Deal | Hiba Qasas | TED
videos.author: TED
videos.description: What if the path to peace starts with self-interest? After four decades inside some of the world's most dangerous conflict zones, mediator Hiba Qasas has learned that most peacebuilding efforts get it wrong from the start. She makes a provocative case that conciliation shouldn't begin with empathy —

videos.title: A Whale’s-Eye-View of the Ocean | Eric Stackpole | TED
videos.author: TED
videos.description: A hand-built camera with suction cups captured something no one had ever seen: two sperm whales communicating and swimming together in the deep ocean. videos.description: Mark Rober spent years trying to land a rover on Mars. videos.title: Why You Should Keep a List of What Makes You Laugh | Chris Duffy  | TED
videos.author: TED
videos.description: The world is weird and hilarious — if you know where to look, says comedian Chris Duffy.
